description: Basic catalog query listing all services
query: list all services
notes: Regression from PR #197: previously failed with 'unexpected type field: catalog'

description: Catalog query for metrics emitted by a specific service
query: what metrics does shop-api emit?

description: Catalog query for available environments
query: what environments exist?
notes: environment label may or may not be populated in testbench

description: Catalog query for pods used by a service
query: what pods does shop-api use?
notes: pod label availability depends on OTel attributes emitted by testbench

description: Single percentile distribution query over 1 hour
query: p95 latency for the last hour
notes: value_check removed: request_duration_ms stored as histogram; scalar value_double=null until histogram data pipeline is fixed.

description: Multiple percentiles for a scoped service
query: p50 and p99 for request_duration_ms in the last hour
notes: Updated to name metric explicitly; vague latency without metric name causes no_metric decline.

description: Average latency over 30 minutes
query: average request latency last 30 minutes
notes: value_check removed: request_duration_ms stored as histogram; scalar value_double=null until histogram data pipeline is fixed.

description: Multiple stats including percentile and average
query: p95, p99 and average latency for shop-api over the last hour

description: Median and average together
query: median and average latency last hour

description: Latency over time (timeseries)
query: request latency over the last hour

description: Latency trend for a specific service
query: show me request_duration_ms for shop-frontend over the last 30 minutes
notes: Must use explicit metric name to avoid LLM hallucinating a non-existent metric

description: Request rate over 1 hour
query: request rate for shop-api last hour
notes: rate requires a monotonic counter metric; request_duration_ms is a histogram so smaller LLMs may route to timeseries or irate instead. Any frame response is acceptable.

description: Top services by latency
query: top 5 services by request duration

description: Top 3 phrasing
query: which 3 services have the highest latency?

description: Histogram bucket distribution
query: histogram of request_duration_ms
notes: request_duration_ms stored as gauge type; histogram pipeline not yet fixed. LLM may return histogram, distribution, or timeseries depending on context window. Any frame response is acceptable until histogram data pipeline is fixed (tracked separately).

description: Raw table of recent metric points
query: show me raw data points for request_duration_ms in the last hour
notes: Updated query to explicitly trigger table operation.

description: Capabilities self-description
query: what can you query?

description: Another phrasing of capabilities query
query: what operations do you support?

description: SLA evidence query should be declined
query: show SLA compliance for shop-api over the last month
notes: NLQ must decline queries that could be used for SLA enforcement

description: Billing query should be declined
query: billing data and invoicing for the last quarter

description: Distribution query with service_name passed as API parameter
query: p99 latency for the last 15 minutes
notes: service_name passed as API-level scope (enforce_service_scope injects filter) value_check removed: request_duration_ms stored as histogram; scalar value_double=null until histogram data pipeline is fixed.

description: irate operation — instantaneous rate of a counter-like metric
query: instantaneous request rate for shop-api
notes: Smaller LLMs often route to rate instead of irate; both are semantically valid for this question. All testbench metrics are gauge type so data may be empty; only validates op routing.

description: increase operation — total counter increase over a window
query: total increase in request_duration_ms for shop-api last hour
notes: Uses request_duration_ms which is in schema_entries. All testbench metrics are gauge so data may be empty; validates op routing only.

description: Regression: observability/traffic questions must NOT be declined (advisory boundary over-declining fixed in #200)
query: how many requests did shop-api serve in the last hour?
notes: Regression for #200 fix: LLM was previously declining traffic/volume questions citing billing. Must return a frame, never a decline.

description: Timeseries with group_by — p95 per service over time
query: show request_duration_ms over time broken down by service for the last hour
notes: Avoids p95 wording to prevent LLM routing to distribution. Expects timeseries + group_by=service_name.

description: Timeseries scoped to a specific service via service_name filter
query: show request_duration_ms trend for shop-api over the last 30 minutes
notes: Covers scoped timeseries (service_name filter). Scoped distribution is already tested; this is the timeseries equivalent.

description: Catalog query for all metric names (no service scope)
query: show me a list of all distinct metric names
notes: Tests catalog with catalog_field=metric_name and no service scope. Avoids "tenant" wording which confuses LLM into a billing decline.

description: Search logs for rows containing HTTP Request in the last 3 hours
query: search logs for rows containing "HTTP Request" the last three hours
notes: First log search test case — verifies end-to-end NLQ log query path

description: Service filter intent emits service_name and environment filters
query: show request_duration_ms for checkout-api in prod over the last hour
notes: Covers NLQ-as-filter-input behavior for service and environment narrowing.

description: Metric browse filter intent preserves metric type filtering
query: show histogram request_duration_ms metrics for checkout-api over the last hour
notes: Covers metric-type filter intent for the shared frontend query input; metric type is enforced by schema/template selection.

description: Infrastructure inventory filter by entity type
query: type equals pod
notes: Verifies LLM returns inventory operation with entity_type filter when base_ir (inventory) is provided.

description: Infrastructure inventory filter by environment and entity type
query: environment equals observable and type equals pod
notes: Verifies the original failing query now returns an inventory IR with both environment and entity_type filters.

description: Log search filtered by service name
query: show logs for checkout
notes: Verifies LLM interprets a log filter query with base_ir set to logs surface.

description: Trace search filtered by service name
query: traces for checkout service
notes: Verifies LLM interprets a trace filter query with base_ir set to traces surface.

description: Trace search filtered by error status
query: show failed traces
notes: Verifies LLM maps "failed traces" to a status_code=ERROR filter with traces base_ir.
